value: We import and distribute exceptional Italian wines to restaurants, wine merchants and fine grocery stores. Our selection favors independent winemakers and sustainable practices.
A passionate team with in-depth knowledge of Italian vineyards. We regularly visit our producers and can provide tailored advice.
We organize professional tastings at our premises or at your place, to help you discover our range and build your wine list.
To receive our catalog and professional pricing, contact us. We carefully review each request and offer tailored conditions.
